name: ASTagSpec
description: [ASTagSpec] manages a set of tags and provides methods for hierarchical matching.

methods.name: add_tag
methods.description: Adds a tag to the container. If the tag already exists, increments its reference count. Returns [code]true[/code] if this is the first reference to the tag.

methods.name: clear
methods.description: Removes all tags from the container.

methods.name: get_all_tags
methods.description: Returns all tags currently in this container.

methods.name: has_all_tags
methods.description: Returns true if the container has all of the specified tags.

methods.name: has_any_tags
methods.description: Returns true if the container has any of the specified tags.

methods.name: has_tag
methods.description: Returns true if the container has the specified tag.

methods.name: remove_tag
methods.description: Decrements the reference count of a tag. If the count reaches zero, the tag is removed. Returns [code]true[/code] if the tag was actually removed (reference count reached zero).
